query:
SELECT 
  b.id as portalBookingId,
  b.ptsRef,
  b.topdogRef,
  b.clientName,
  b.clientEmail,
  b.destination,
  b.departureDate,
  b.numberOfNights,
  b.grossCost,
  b.expectedCommission,
  b.commissionVat,
  b.passengers,
  b.currentStage,
  b.bookedDate,
  b.createdAt,
  b.supplierName,
  b.crmRef,
  u.name as agentName,
  u.email as agentEmail
FROM bookings b
JOIN users u ON u.id = b.agentId
WHERE b.agentId = 60600
ORDER BY b.departureDate DESC
LIMIT 200;
